items.title: SPIRAL: Learning to Search and Aggregate
items.abstract: Language model reasoning can be substantially improved at test time via scaffolds that scale inference compute across different primitives -- sequential reasoning within a trace, independently sampled parallel traces, and aggregation of multiple reasoning traces into a final response. During post-training, however, language models are optimized only for sequential reasoning within a single trace. We introduce Sequential-Parallel-Aggregative Reinforcement Learning (SPIRAL), a framework in which a language model is trained to use all three primitives, as part of a unified inference compute pipeline. Concretely, the language model first samples a set of independent traces in parallel, each produced through sequential chain-of-thought reasoning, and then generates a final aggregation trace conditioned on those traces; all components are optimized end-to-end against the reward of the final aggregated response. To train this system, SPIRAL uses set reinforcement learning to teach models to produce a set of traces that are collectively useful for an aggregator and standard reinforcement learning to teach models to aggregate the set into improved final responses. Our experiments on reasoning tasks show that SPIRAL effectively scales with inference compute, outperforming GRPO by up to 11$\times$ scaling efficiency and 15% higher performance when all three compute primitives are scaled.
items.llm_evidence_en: RL-based framework to optimize reasoning with parallel traces and aggregation for efficiency
items.llm_evidence_cn: 基于RL的推理优化框架，使用并行轨迹和聚合提升效率
items.llm_evidence: 基于RL的推理优化框架，使用并行轨迹和聚合提升效率
items.canonical_evidence: 基于RL的推理优化框架，使用并行轨迹和聚合提升效率
items.llm_tldr_en: SPIRAL uses reinforcement learning to train language models to use sequential, parallel, and aggregative reasoning, optimizing inference compute pipeline for efficiency.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 语言模型推理可通过扩展推理计算提升，但后训练只优化单轨迹序列推理。本文提出SPIRAL框架，通过强化学习训练模型同时使用序列、并行和聚合推理原语。模型先并行采样多个独立推理轨迹，然后聚合生成最终答案。实验表明该方法在多个推理任务上以更优效率取得了更强性能。
items.llm_tldr: 语言模型推理可通过扩展推理计算提升，但后训练只优化单轨迹序列推理。本文提出SPIRAL框架，通过强化学习训练模型同时使用序列、并行和聚合推理原语。模型先并行采样多个独立推理轨迹，然后聚合生成最终答案。实验表明该方法在多个推理任务上以更优效率取得了更强性能。
